M-EMAIL.NAME: Resend Adapter
M-EMAIL.Purpose: Send verification emails through the Resend API, preserve readable UTF-8 payload content, and normalize provider-specific failures.

Scope.Item: Build email payloads with magic links
Pass subject, HTML, and text bodies through JSON transport without Cyrillic mojibake
Map provider and transport failures into application-level errors

Interfaces.Interface: Accepts email and verification URL, returns success or typed failure.

Risks.Risk: 401 and 429 responses must be distinguishable for operators
Provider outage should degrade gracefully for users
Payload encoding drift can produce unreadable verification emails even when delivery succeeds
